positive: A hyper-detailed, symmetrical illustration of bioluminescent deep-sea flora and fauna forming a complex, abstract tapestry. The central motif features intricate geometric patterns mixed with natural forms, such as stylized coral, jellyfish bell outlines, and glowing kelp strands. Style is Neo-Art Nouveau linocut etching, featuring ultra-clean black lines against a vibrant, ethereal cyan and indigo gradient background. Strong contrast is crucial, utilizing deep black silhouettes for the foreground elements and minimal, glowing internal color washes for depth. Composition must be highly centered and suitable for repeating or single apparel print placement, emphasizing clean edges, high detail density, and a mystical, fantastical atmosphere. Overhead view, flat composition, high contrast.
negative: blur, out of focus, grayscale, text, watermark, logo, signature, artifact, noise, extra limbs, bad anatomy, low resolution, cropped, jpeg artifacts, messy, poor quality
